case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ARNEL JONATHAN VIZCONDE GUTAY

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIZCONDE GUTAY, ARNEL JONATHAN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT NOT APPEAR . PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED LOAN DELINQUENCY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 - SERVED FEB-09-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VIZCONDE GUTAY, ARNEL JONATHAN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VIZCONDE GUTAY, ARNEL JONATHAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VIZCONDE GUTAY, ARNEL JONATHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
